raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current headspace","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Ahmed?","description":"Lets Ahmed set context in his own terms before the conversation turns to scope or growth.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role in practice","name":"What feels most solid in your role right now?","description":"Surfaces the parts of his current Head of Product scope that feel steady and real.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-level meaning","name":"What does senior scope mean to you in practice?","description":"Gets his definition of the next-level role without jumping straight to performance gaps.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Own the next chapter","name":"Where do you want your scope to be broader a year from now?","description":"Forces a concrete picture of the kind of broader ownership he wants to earn.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility bottleneck","name":"Where does stakeholder trust feel weakest right now?","description":"Surfaces the specific relationships or decision contexts that may be limiting influence.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence without detail","name":"What decisions are you still getting pulled into too tactically?","description":"Reveals where he may be operating below his level instead of shaping direction.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership boundary","name":"What are you still carrying personally that should live with the team?","description":"Tests whether he is holding onto executor work that should be delegated or systematized.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"Where would a sharper read from me help you move faster?","description":"Opens a concrete ask of the manager without defaulting to generic support.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"First growth move","name":"What is the first shift you want to make before we meet again?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete next move he owns.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
